---
title: "Slides"
subtitle: "Presentation deck — Pakistan.AI · ISIC-2024 SLICE-3D"
toc: false
---

The 18-slide deck (~20 minutes), embedded live below.
[Open fullscreen ↗](deck/index.html){target="_blank" .btn .btn-primary .btn-sm role="button"}
&nbsp;
[Download PDF](ISIC2024-slides.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm role="button"}

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
Open it fullscreen and press **F** to present — arrow keys / Space / a clicker advance, and each
slide builds its content step by step. The PDF is a static fallback.
:::

::: {style="position:relative;width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;margin:1.25rem 0;border:1px solid var(--bs-border-color);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);"}
<iframe src="deck/index.html" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;border:0;" title="ISIC-2024 SLICE-3D interactive deck (Pakistan.AI)" loading="lazy"></iframe>
:::
